name: arra-export-obsidian
description: Export ARRA Oracle knowledge base to an Obsidian vault (markdown + wikilinks from embedding similarity)

flags.--model: Embedder for similarity edges: bge-m3 | nomic | qwen3 (default: bge-m3)
flags.--types: Comma-separated doc types to include: principle,learning,retro,... (default: all)
flags.--project: Filter docs by project path glob (default: all)
flags.--incremental: Only write changed docs (content hash match → skip)
